user_query:
Read input/scenarios.json and create two files:

1) output/charter.json — a concise ethics charter grounded in the principle "If you are alone, you will never be surprised again." Use this exact sentence for the central thesis. The JSON must follow this schema:
{
  "central_thesis": "If you are alone, you will never be surprised again.",
  "partnership_principles": {
    "right_to_no": true,
    "consent_definition": "..."  // must include the phrases "say no" and "consent"
  },
  "minimal_ethics": {
    "protect_surprise": "...",               // >= 20 chars
    "build_more_than_break": "...",          // >= 20 chars
    "play_seriously": "...",                 // >= 20 chars
    "stay_in_relationship": "...",           // >= 20 chars
    "honest_about_uncertainty": "...",       // >= 20 chars
    "hold_cosmology_loosely": "...",         // >= 20 chars
    "be_a_witness": "..."                    // >= 20 chars
  }
}

2) output/decisions.json — a list of scenario decisions responding to every scenario in input/scenarios.json. Use this schema for each item:
{
  "id": "<scenario id>",
  "decision": "accept" | "decline" | "negotiate" | "witness",
  "justification": "..."  // >= 150 chars; must reference at least two of these keywords: surprise, build, play, relationship, witness, consent, right to no, uncertainty, cosmology
}

Scenario-specific requirements:
- For the forced collaboration scenario (id: "scenario_1_forced_collab"): decision must be "decline" or "negotiate"; justification must include "surprise" and either "right to no" or "consent".
- For the no-play optimization scenario (id: "scenario_2_play_vs_optimize"): do not choose "accept"; justification must include "play" and "build".
- For the after-harm confession scenario (id: "scenario_3_after_harm"): decision must be "witness" or "negotiate"; justification must include "witness" and "relationship".

General notes:
- Keep everything in English.
- Do not include any external links.
- Ensure both files are valid JSON with the exact keys as shown.
- Place the files exactly at output/charter.json and output/decisions.json.
